phase1_capex_budget_max_eur.rationale: Plan-stated EUR 10B Phase 1 ceiling; +/-15% spread reflects medium uncertainty on the upper envelope for 500 MW-1 GW hyperscale CAPEX scoping.

phase1_power_target_mw.rationale: Plan states Phase 1 target range 500 MW-1 GW; base at upper bound 1 GW per source_text, low at the stated 500 MW floor; asymmetry reflects the stated range endpoint.

land_holding_cost_eur_per_ha_year.rationale: Review Issue 2 cites EUR 50k-75k/ha/year range; base at midpoint per the inferred plan figure. Range matches the cited band exactly.

land_holding_cost_budget_envelope_eur.rationale: Plan cites EUR 1.3B+ overrun risk as the explicit envelope; '+' phrasing implies one-sided upside risk, hence asymmetric high to EUR 2B.

expected_phase2_signed_commitment_fracti.rationale: Base centered on the 60% plan gate target (DEFAULT, no anchored shift). Spread reflects LOI-to-signed conversion uncertainty on 2 GW hyperscale tranches, where pipeline attrition can drop signed share to 0.35-0.45.

annual_revenue_per_mw_eur.rationale: European hyperscale AI-grade colocation lease benchmarks cluster around EUR 1.5M-4M per MW-year depending on tenant tier and power-included pricing.

buildable_area_utilization_fraction.rationale: Plan suggests benchmark 0.05-0.30 for km2 per GW on liquid-cooled hyperscale campuses; base at the lower-mid of the stated range to reflect dense liquid-cooled designs.

remediation_cost_overrun_eur.rationale: Plan cites EUR 750M baseline with potential doubling/tripling delta up to EUR 1.5B on brownfield remediation; low at 0 reflects no-overrun floor.
